role.name: Explorer
role.description: Observant (S) and Prospecting (P) personality types, known for their spontaneity, ingenuity, and ability to live in the moment.
role.description_zh: 观察型(S)和展望型(P)人格类型，以其自发性、独创性和活在当下的能力著称。

strategy.name: Confident Individualism
strategy.description: Confident Individualists prefer doing things alone, choosing to rely on their own skills and instincts as opposed to seeking others' help.
strategy.description_zh: 自信独立者喜欢独自做事，选择依靠自己的技能和直觉，而不是寻求他人的帮助。

introverted.name: Introverted
introverted.description: Individuals prefer solitary activities and get exhausted by social interaction. They tend to be quite sensitive to external stimulation (e.g. sound) in general.
introverted.description_zh: 内向型个体喜欢独处活动，通过社交互动感到疲惫。他们通常对外部刺激（如声音）相当敏感。

observant.name: Observant
observant.description: Individuals are highly practical, pragmatic and down-to-earth. They tend to have strong habits and focus on what is happening or has already happened.
observant.description_zh: 观察型个体非常务实、实用且脚踏实地。他们往往有很强的习惯，专注于正在发生或已经发生的事情。

feeling.name: Feeling
feeling.description: Individuals are sensitive and emotionally expressive. They are more empathic and less competitive than Thinking types, and focus on social harmony and cooperation.
feeling.description_zh: 情感型个体敏感且善于情感表达。他们比思考型更具同理心、竞争性更低，注重社会和谐与合作。

prospecting.name: Prospecting
prospecting.description: Individuals are very good at improvising and spotting opportunities. They tend to be flexible, relaxed nonconformists who prefer keeping their options open.
prospecting.description_zh: 展望型个体非常擅长即兴发挥和发现机会。他们往往是灵活、放松的不墨守成规者，喜欢保持选择的开放性。

assertive.name: Assertive
assertive.description: Individuals are self-assured, even-tempered and resistant to stress. They refuse to worry too much and do not push themselves too hard when it comes to achieving goals.
assertive.description_zh: 果断型个体自信、沉稳且抗压。他们拒绝过度担忧，在实现目标时不会对自己过于苛刻。

strengths.name: Charming
strengths.description: Adventurers are relaxed and warm, and their "live and let live" attitude naturally makes them likable and popular.
strengths.description_zh: 探险家放松且温暖，他们"自己活也让别人活"的态度自然使他们讨人喜欢和受欢迎。

strengths.name: Sensitive to Others
strengths.description: Adventurers easily relate to others' emotions, helping them to establish harmony and good will, and minimize conflict.
strengths.description_zh: 探险家容易理解他人的情绪，帮助他们建立和谐与善意，并最小化冲突。

strengths.name: Passionate
strengths.description: Beneath Adventurers' quiet shyness beats an intensely feeling heart. When people with this personality type are caught up in something exciting and interesting, they can leave everything else in the dust.
strengths.description_zh: 在探险家安静的害羞之下，跳动着一颗强烈感受的心。当这种人格类型的人沉浸在令人兴奋和有趣的事情中时，他们可以把其他一切都抛在脑后。

strengths.name: Curious
strengths.description: Ideas are well and good, but Adventurers need to see and explore for themselves whether their ideas ring true. Their creative and humanistic vision is often exactly what a project needs to move forward.
strengths.description_zh: 想法固然好，但探险家需要亲自看到和探索他们的想法是否站得住脚。他们的创造性和人文视野往往正是一个项目前进所需要的。

weaknesses.name: Fiercely Independent
weaknesses.description: Freedom of expression is often Adventurers' top priority. Anything that interferes with that, like traditions and hard rules, creates a sense of oppression for Adventurers.
weaknesses.description_zh: 表达自由往往是探险家的首要任务。任何干扰这一点的东西，如传统和严格的规则，都会给探险家带来压迫感。

weaknesses.name: Unpredictable
weaknesses.description: Adventurers dislike long-term commitments and plans. The tendency to actively avoid planning for the future can put strain on their romantic relationships and finances.
weaknesses.description_zh: 探险家不喜欢长期承诺和计划。积极避免为未来做计划的倾向可能会给他们的浪漫关系和财务带来压力。

weaknesses.name: Easily Stressed
weaknesses.description: Adventurers live in the present, full of emotion. When situations get out of control, people with this personality type can shut down, losing their characteristic charm and creativity in favor of gnashing teeth.
weaknesses.description_zh: 探险家活在当下，充满情感。当情况失控时，这种人格类型的人可能会崩溃，失去他们特有的魅力和创造力，取而代之的是咬牙切齿。

weaknesses.name: Overly Competitive
weaknesses.description: Adventurers can sometimes escalate small things into intense competitions, turning down long-term success in their search for glory in the moment.
weaknesses.description_zh: 探险家有时会把小事升级为激烈的竞争，为了追求当下的荣耀而放弃长期的成功。

research_insight.title: Research Insight
research_insight.content: Assertive Adventurers are the most likely personality type to suppress their own feelings rather than hurt someone else's.
research_insight.content_zh: 果断型探险家是最有可能压抑自己的感受而不是伤害他人的人格类型。
